## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual SOS flow checked
- [ ] Screenshots/docs updated if user-facing behavior changed

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, private keys, or `.env.local`
- [ ] No real phone numbers, medical details, or private locations
- [ ] No claims added without evidence or clear prototype wording
- [ ] Guest SOS flow remains accessible
